silmaril_bootstrap.mission: Find a durable, real, measurable edge in US EQUITIES using a multi-agent system that trades on Alpaca paper, scores itself on CLEAN data, and adapts. The system must surface honestly when no edge exists. "Remain observational — no demonstrated edge" is an acceptable, honest outcome, not a failure.

scope.in: US equities and equity ETFs. Real Alpaca paper execution. News-driven and technical-driven stock signals. Self-scoring, learning, and adaptation.
scope.out: Crypto, micro-cap tokens, prediction markets / sports betting. As of Alpha 0.001 these are OUT OF SCOPE. Any agent that cannot trade a real US-equity order through Alpaca is disabled or removed. Nothing synthetic is generated or displayed.

non_negotiables.rule: Never edit a file without reading its actual current contents in full. Patch-without-reading has caused every major regression (the Alpha 5.0 dashboard wipeout, the alpaca_paper SyntaxError bridge failure, cascading indentation breaks). Read first. Always.
Deliver complete, drag-and-drop whole-file replacements suitable for GitHub web-UI upload. No diffs, no partial files, no "paste this snippet at line N". Git commands are optional reference only.
Classify every change: Track A (safe now: read-only / additive / reversible), Track B (behavioral: changes trading or scoring), Track C (future). Never resolve classification silently.

Honest "it doesn't work / no edge yet" beats a flattering story. The dashboard is a window into reality and a control deck — never a Potemkin display. No fabricated, simulated, or internally-compounded numbers.
Optimize for realized money, not win-rate. Win-rate is not profit (see ATLAS: 80% win, -$2.90 realized).

Give capital-control authority ("teeth") only to intelligence that has demonstrated value on clean data. Advisory analytics that don't change a trade are either wired in or cut — not left as decoration.

accounts.note: All three are UNDER principal (~2-4% down). The harvest sweep is therefore capped to $0 and is NOT currently draining capital.

benchmark.truth: Over a month the elaborate system trails SPY. This is THE scoreboard. It belongs on the cockpit, front and center.

scoring.how_fixed: Keyed fresh-quote price overlay (prices.py) + clean-evidence gate in scoring (stale excluded from win-rate/EV/weights) + one-time prune + non-trading-day scoring gate.
scoring.caveat: Clean data is new and thin per-agent. No agent has yet proven a real edge. WEAVER currently tops the board at ~75% on ~44 clean calls.

execution.fixed: HTTP 422 "sub-penny increment": limit prices now rounded to $0.01 for stocks >= $1 (was 4dp, rejected). Extended-hours limit orders now fill.
Cross-workflow broker lock: daily.yml + evening_prep.yml share one concurrency group (no more concurrent-order race).

what_has_teeth.item: Thompson conviction multipliers: each agent's vote is scaled by its Bayesian per-regime win rate. This is the live learn->trade feedback loop.
Regime classification (SPY/VIX) — feeds context and regime-specific learning.
News sentiment — indirectly, via the ~17 agents that read sentiment_score.
Kill-switch weight — freezes chronically low-scoring agents.

what_has_no_teeth.note: computed and displayed, but change no trade — wire in or cut

known_broken.item: The senate "breeds new agents like Pokemon" only on paper: offspring are PROPOSED as cards but never instantiated as voting agents. Training of EXISTING agents works (Thompson + kill-switch); creation of NEW agents does not. Fix path: evolve PARAMETERS of existing agents (tractable) rather than instantiate new classes.
Scoring rewards directional correctness, not realized P&L. Agents can win often and lose money. Fold realized P&L into scoring.
Roster counts disagree: portfolios=31, risk_state=31, scoring=20, hardcoded reset=27, agents-dir=39. Establish one source of truth.
H3/H5 state files say configured:false while actively trading — a state-write ordering bug, cosmetic (accounts are on).
Accounts hold high cash; partly a pre-cycle snapshot artifact, partly the consensus-conviction threshold gating opens.

untapped_resources.note: keys present in workflow, referenced in ZERO code — no new signup needed

key.name: NEWSAPI_API_KEY
key.use: structured financial news beyond free Google RSS

untapped_resources.in_use: FMP, Tiingo, TwelveData, Finnhub (prices + earnings), FRED (macro), Alpaca (exec).
untapped_resources.truth: The constraint is NEVER data access. It is wiring the data already paid for.

news_pipeline.ingest: Live via free Google News RSS (feedparser). NewsAPI/Marketaux unused.
news_pipeline.label: Finance lexicon with 2-word negation window + magnitude weighting (Alpha 7.3). Headlines + summaries. Ceiling: verb-phrase negation ("failed to deliver growth") still misreads. Real upgrade: Marketaux.
news_pipeline.use: Consumed by ~17 agents and bucketed as a regime tag in learning.
news_pipeline.unmeasured: Whether sentiment actually PREDICTS outcomes — now testable on clean data. Do this before trusting it further.

roadmap.step: Wire Marketaux entity sentiment + score article summaries into agent decisions; then MEASURE sentiment's predictive lift on clean data.
Give teeth to advisory analytics that prove out (regime/sector gating or sizing) — or cut them.
Make "breeding" real via parameter-evolution of existing agents.
Unify the roster; put the SPY benchmark on the cockpit; retire dead/synthetic surfaces; make the cockpit the front door.

silmaril_bootstrap.platform_truth: Trading hours are set by the exchange and Alpaca — NOT by the compute host. Migrating off GitHub Actions buys reliability/scheduling-precision/latency, not market hours. US equities never trade nights/weekends regardless of platform.
silmaril_bootstrap.delivery_protocol: Go dark and deliver. Read every touched file fully. Ship complete files + a release note (root cause + rollback). Validate (compile/parse/proof) before declaring done. Pause for approval between behavioral (Track B) units.
